name: Frozen Strawberry Margarita Dessert
recipeInstructions:
To make crust: Combine pretzels, sugar and melted butter. Press firmly into bottom of 8-inch springform pan. Chill.
For filling, combine condensed milk, lime juice, tequila and orange liqueur. Beat until smooth. Add strawberries and beat at low speed until well-blended. Fold in whipping cream. Pour over crust and freeze for 4-6 hours or until firm. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes before serving.
